message:
fix(aggregator): saturating unique_symbols decrement and clamp loss_rate for quality_score

- rollback_record: use fetch_update with checked_sub to prevent u64
  wraparound on double-rollback (previously fetch_sub could wrap to MAX)
- quality_score: clamp loss_rate to [0.0, 1.0] to prevent NaN from
  propagating into path selection sorting

Also includes audit batch 475 entries for io/cap.rs (first-ever audit),
messaging/control.rs, transport/aggregator.rs, http/h1/http_client.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
